transcript: Speaker A: The best way to improve your English is to practice everyday, aur isme mai tumhari help karungi. Hello, I am Arya, tumhari AI English teacher. Mere sath tum kahin bhi practice kar sakte ho, ab tumhe cycle chala ke english coaching classes jaane ki zarrorat nahi hai. Tum agar galat english bologe to mai kabhi judge nahi karungi and tum galtiya karoge to turant unhe correct bhi kar dungi. Roz mere sath bas 10-15 minutes practice karo and in some days your english will improve and tum confidence ke sath english bol paoge. And best part hai ki tum bas 1 rupaye me mere sath english practice karna shuru kar sakte ho. To der kis baat ki, install button par click karo, Mysivi app install karo and apni english journey shuru karo. [The best way to improve your English is to practice everyday, and I will help you with this. Hello, I am Arya, your AI English teacher. You can practice with me anywhere, now you don't need to ride a cycle to go to English coaching classes. If you speak wrong English, I will never judge you, and if you make mistakes, I will correct them immediately. Just practice with me for 10-15 minutes daily, and in some days your English will improve and you will be able to speak English with confidence. And the best part is that you can start practicing English with me for just 1 rupee. So why wait, click on the install button, install the Mysivi app, and start your English journey.]

summary: An AI avatar named Arya promotes the Mysivi app as a judgment-free way to practice English daily. She promises instant corrections and convenience over traditional coaching classes. The ad highlights a 1-rupee offer and urges users to download the app.
